All along the edge of the woods at Glasgow Park. Access: Public.

Delicious apples, possibly Winesap variety. Seems to fruit biennially. Full size tree - bring your apple picker, or just pick up fruit drops. On university land commonly used by the public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
